hero.title: Learning, mapped to the role you actually hold
hero.body_1: NAS Smart LMS connects every job title to the qualifications it requires — and every qualification to the courses that earn it.
hero.body_2: It's how employees know exactly what to learn next, and how HR teams know who's ready for what.

journey.title: How we work, and where it is leading

begin.label: Principle
begin.title: The journey begins
begin.desc: We connect job titles, qualifications, and courses into one system, so learning is never disconnected from the role someone actually holds today.

real.title: We track what is real
real.desc: Progress reflects actual completion, attendance, and scores - never estimates.

language.title: Language is not an afterthought
language.desc: Arabic and English are built side by side, from day one.

record.title: One record, not three
record.desc: Learning is one continuous story across app, website, and dashboard.

earned.title: Nothing is issued unearned
earned.desc: Certificates and progress only appear when the work behind them is actually done.

headed.label: Where We Are Headed
headed.title: Scaling across NAS
headed.desc: A NAS where every qualification is already mapped, and every course moves employees visibly closer to it.

certificates.title: Verifiable certificates
certificates.desc: Auto-generated from real completion, attendance, and score logic.

bilingual.title: Bilingual by design
bilingual.desc: Arabic and RTL are first-class from day one, not a translation layer.

connected.title: One connected system
connected.desc: Dashboard, website, and app share data in real time.

personalization.title: Personalization engine
personalization.desc: Courses map automatically to job titles and qualifications.

cta.title: Let's write the next chapter together.
cta.subtitle: See how NAS Smart LMS brings job titles, qualifications, and courses together in one system.
cta.subtitle_mobile: Brings job titles, qualifications, and courses together in one system.

contact.hero_subtitle: Book a short call to see how NAS LMS connects your team's roles to the right qualifications and courses - automatically.

differ.title: One system, two connected views

book.title: Book a demo

book.desc_mobile: Book a demo with our consultants to suit your team's specific needs.

explore.title: Explore the system

explore.desc_mobile: See the platform in action to understand how it can empower your team and elevate performance.

onboarding.title: Dedicated onboarding
onboarding.desc: Get a fully tailored, ready-to-use system. A dedicated consultant will handle all your data entry and configuration for you.
onboarding.desc_mobile: Get a fully tailored, ready-to-use setup with consultant guidance.

testimonials.q1: “We stopped hand-assigning courses. Set the role once, and every employee sees exactly the path their qualifications require.”
testimonials.q2: “The perfect blend of theory and practice”
testimonials.q3: “The perfect blend of theory and practice—I finally feel confident in my new skillset”
testimonials.q4: “This course was a total game-changer, breaking down complex topics into actionable steps that helped me succeed immediately”
testimonials.q5: “I walked away with practical, real-world skills that I started applying to my work the very next day”

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What should I expect during my demo call?
faq.a1: During your demo call, our team will walk you through the key features of NAS LMS, tailored to your organization's needs. We'll answer any questions you have and discuss how NAS LMS can help you achieve your HR goals.
faq.a1_mobile: During your demo call, our team will walk you through the key features of NAS LMS, tailored to your organization's needs. We'll answer any questions you have and discuss how NAS LMS can help.
faq.q3: Does the contract include dedicated human support?
faq.q3_mobile: Does the contract include human support?
faq.q4: Can I purchase Performance or OKRs and Goals separately?
faq.q6: In what currency will I be billed?
faq.q7: Is the contract billed monthly, quarterly, or annually?
faq.q8: Are there additional fees for implementation or change management?
faq.contact_q: Have a question we didn't answer?
